title: Die Falkner vom Falkenhof. Erster Band.
summaries: "Die Falkner vom Falkenhof. Erster Band." by Eufemia von Adlersfeld-Ballestrem is a novel published in 1890. Beautiful opera singer Dolores von Falkner unexpectedly inherits a grand aristocratic estate, the Falkenhof, reuniting her with Alfred, her childhood companion and cousin who expected the inheritance himself. As family tensions simmer and a vengeful relative plots murder to claim the estate, Dolores must navigate complex relationships while mysterious visions of her ancestor—a mad murderess—haunt her dreams with cryptic warnings and prophecies. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
